data.title: Parkson Retail Group Revises Interim Dividend Announcement
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Parkson Retail Group ( (HK:3368) ).

Parkson Retail Group Limited announced a revised interim dividend of RMB 0.02 per share for the six months ending June 30, 2025, with the payment to be made in Hong Kong dollars at an exchange rate of RMB 1 to HKD 1.09369. This update corrects the previously announced exchange rate, and the dividend will be paid on October 15, 2025, reflecting the company’s ongoing commitment to shareholder returns.

More about Parkson Retail Group

Parkson Retail Group Limited operates in the retail industry, focusing on department store operations. The company provides a wide range of consumer products, including fashion and lifestyle items, catering to a broad market audience.

Average Trading Volume: 5,189,867

Current Market Cap: HK$368.8M

data.description:
Proximar Seafood AS ( (DE:84Q) ) has issued an announcement.

Proximar Seafood AS has announced the commencement of a fully underwritten rights issue, aiming to issue 150 million new shares at a subscription price of NOK 1 per share. data.description:
CoreWeave ( (CRWV) ) has provided an announcement.

On September 29, 2025, CoreWeave Compute Acquisition Co., IV, LLC, a subsidiary of CoreWeave, Inc., amended its existing credit agreement to include an additional $3 billion in delayed draw term loans. This amendment aims to enhance the company’s operational capacity by funding the acquisition and maintenance of essential equipment and infrastructure, potentially strengthening its market position and service offerings.

data.title: Kazia Therapeutics Reports Significant Tumor Reduction in TNBC Patient with Paxalisib
data.description:
Kazia Therapeutics ( (KZIA) ) just unveiled an update.

On October 2, 2025, Kazia Therapeutics announced an 86% reduction in tumor burden in a metastatic triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) patient treated with a combination of paxalisib and immunotherapy. This significant result from a single-patient expanded-access case aligns with the company’s ongoing Phase 1b trial, which is exploring the efficacy of paxalisib in combination with Keytruda and chemotherapy for advanced breast cancer. The announcement underscores Kazia’s commitment to advancing its clinical trials and potentially enhancing treatment options for TNBC patients.

The most recent analyst rating on (KZIA) stock is a Buy with a $20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kazia Therapeutics stock, see the KZIA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KZIA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KZIA is a Underperform.

Kazia Therapeutics has a low overall stock score due to significant financial instability marked by declining revenues, negative equity, and cash flow issues. Technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, and poor valuation metrics reflect the company’s unprofitability. The absence of dividends and positive earnings call or corporate events data further emphasize the company’s challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on KZIA stock, click here.

More about Kazia Therapeutics

Kazia Therapeutics Limited is an oncology-focused drug development company based in Sydney, Australia. Its lead program is paxalisib, an investigational brain penetrant inhibitor of the PI3K/Akt/mTOR pathway, developed for treating multiple forms of cancer. The company is engaged in various clinical trials, including those for glioblastoma and advanced breast cancer, and has received several designations from the FDA for its innovative treatments.

Average Trading Volume: 273,025

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $9.31M

data.title: Greatview Aseptic Packaging Announces Investigation Findings Amid Trading Suspension
data.description:
Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) has shared an update.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited has announced key findings from a special investigation initiated in early 2025, following concerns raised about a restructuring that involved a significant change in its international business holdings. The investigation, conducted by Grant Thornton Advisory Services Limited, addressed issues related to the consolidation of international business, accuracy of restructuring information, and alleged financial disclosure inaccuracies. The findings have led to a continued suspension of trading in the company’s shares, impacting stakeholders and raising questions about the company’s financial practices and governance.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited operates in the packaging industry, specializing in aseptic packaging solutions. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$3.52B

data.title: KMC Properties ASA Announces Potential Merger with BEWI Invest ASA
data.description:
KMC Properties ASA ( (DE:5FM) ) has issued an announcement.

KMC Properties ASA has announced a potential all-share merger with BEWI Invest ASA, where KMC will be the surviving entity. To support this merger, KMC plans to raise approximately NOK 4 million through a private placement of new shares directed at Bekken Invest AS. Additionally, changes in the board’s leadership and nomination committee are proposed, with an extraordinary general meeting scheduled for October 23, 2025, to address these matters.

More about KMC Properties ASA

data.title: NexGen Energy Upsizes Equity Offering to Fund Rook I Project
data.description:
NexGen Energy ( (TSE:NXE) ) just unveiled an update.

On October 2, 2025, NexGen Energy Ltd. announced an upsized AUD $600 million equity offering in Australia, fully underwritten by Aitken Mount Capital Partners Pty Ltd, and a concurrent C$400 million bought deal equity offering in North America. The proceeds from these offerings will be used to advance the engineering of the Rook I Project, cover pre-production capital costs, and for general corporate purposes. This strategic financial move is expected to bolster NexGen’s position in the uranium mining industry, supporting its mission to address global challenges in decarbonization, energy security, and access to power.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NXE) stock is a Buy with a C$16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NexGen Energy stock, see the TSE:NXE Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:NXE is a Neutral.

The technical analysis shows some positive momentum, although caution is advised due to potential overbought conditions. The valuation is constrained by a negative P/E ratio, reflecting the company’s current unprofitability. Recent corporate events provide positive long-term prospects, but are already considered in the earnings call.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:NXE stock, click here.

More about NexGen Energy

NexGen Energy is a Canadian company focused on delivering clean energy fuel for the future. The company’s flagship Rook I Project is being developed into the largest low-cost producing uranium mine globally, incorporating elite environmental and social governance standards. NexGen is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange, the NYSE, and the ASX, providing access to global investors.

data.title: Rivian Reports Q3 2025 Production and Delivery Figures
data.description:
The latest update is out from Rivian Automotive ( (RIVN) ).

On October 2, 2025, Rivian announced its production and delivery figures for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, with 10,720 vehicles produced and 13,201 delivered, aligning with its outlook. The company narrowed its 2025 delivery guidance to 41,500 to 43,500 vehicles and plans to release its third-quarter financial results on November 4, 2025, followed by an audio webcast to discuss business performance and outlook.

data.title: Sonoro Gold Secures $3 Million for Cerro Caliche Project Expansion
data.description:
Sonoro Gold ( (TSE:SGO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Sonoro Gold Corp. announced a fully-subscribed $3 million private placement to fund the ongoing development of its Cerro Caliche gold project in Sonora, Mexico. The proceeds will be used to secure full ownership of the mining concessions, update the Preliminary Economic Assessment, and cover regional permitting costs, enhancing the company’s operational capabilities and strategic positioning in the mining sector.

More about Sonoro Gold

Sonoro Gold Corp. is a publicly listed exploration and development company with projects in Sonora State, Mexico, including the development-stage Cerro Caliche project and the exploration-stage San Marcial project. The company is supported by experienced operational and management teams with a track record in discovering and developing natural resource deposits.

Average Trading Volume: 326,299

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy
